mission.prompt:
Create a high-quality, website-ready visual for Digisaka, a Philippine digital agriculture platform.
Section direction: Filipino farmers and agricultural field teams collaborating with mobile or tablet tools, warm documentary style.
Aspect ratio: 1:1.
Style: realistic, clean, premium, agriculture technology, bright natural light, visually inspectable subjects.
Avoid random text, fake logos, distorted UI, watermarks, and unreadable typography unless text is explicitly requested.
User prompt: STRICT isolated icon asset only. The entire background from edge to edge must be one perfectly flat solid #ff00ff color for chroma key removal. Center one simple premium green line icon, rounded organic agriculture style, dark forest green stroke, tiny light green accent, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermark, no square frame, no shadow outside the icon. Keep generous #ff00ff padding. Do not use #ff00ff in the icon. Icon concept: farmer decision mission, a document checklist with a small sprout and location marker.
